basic_details.job_title: GMCH Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 77 Senior Resident, CMO and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Government Medical College & Hospital (GMCH), Establishment Branch-II, Chandigarh
basic_details.post_name: Senior Resident, CMO (General Medicine & General Surgery), Resident Anaesthetist, Resident Pathologist
basic_details.department: Establishment Branch-II, Government Medical College & Hospital, Chandigarh
basic_details.job_type: Tenure Post - 06 months (extendable as per Selection Committee recommendation)
basic_details.short_information: GMCH Chandigarh is announcing 77 posts of Senior Residents, CMO, Resident Anaesthetist & Resident Pathologist through Walk-in-Interview on 25 May 2026.

application_fee.details: Application fee is to be deposited on the spot at GMCH at the time of Walk-in-Interview. Applicants applying for multiple posts/departments are required to deposit the fee only once. The application fee once deposited shall not be refunded in any circumstance.

age_limit.details: Upper age limit as on 01-05-2026 is 45 years for all posts (Senior Residents, CMO General Medicine & General Surgery, Resident Anaesthetist & Resident Pathologist). Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per Chandigarh Administration instructions.

qualification.nationality: Indian Nationals only. No candidate of foreign nationality is eligible.
qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate Medical Degree i.e. (MD/MS/DNB/MCh/DM) or equivalent in the concerned specialty, recognized by MCI and registered either with Medical Council of India or State Medical Council.
qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the date of Walk-in-Interview. Only Indian Nationals are eligible to apply. Candidates must bring duly filled application form along with requisite fee and testimonials to the Establishment Branch-II, Block-D, GMCH-32, Chandigarh on 25-05-2026 before 11:00 A.M.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 67,700/- (minimum pay 1st Cell of Level-11) + NPA @ 20% as per Central Government Services (R. Pay) Rules 2016

selection_process: Selection will be done through Walk-in-Interview. Final engagement is tenure-based for 06 months
extendable only as per the recommendation of the Selection Committee and subject to the approval of the competent authority. In case of selection through walk-in-interview
candidates must apply afresh when the regular advertisement is released.
Walk-in-Interview will be held on 25-05-2026 (Monday) at 2:00 P.M. in the office of Director Principal (Room No. 210)
Chandigarh. Applications will be received upto 11:00 A.M. on the same day. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the Walk-in-Interview.
Candidates belonging to their own category only will be considered against the reserved vacancies. In case of non-availability of candidates in OBC category
candidates belonging to other categories including unreserved will be considered for appointment
only as per the recommendation of the Selection Committee. SC/OBC candidates applying against unreserved posts are not entitled to any relaxation in upper age limit.
how_to_apply: This is a Walk-in-Interview recruitment. No online application or postal application is accepted. Candidates must obtain the prescribed application form from the official website of GMCH, fill it up duly, and submit it in person at the Establishment Branch-II, Block-D, GMCH-32, Chandigarh on 25-05-2026 before 11:00 A.M. along with the requisite application fee and testimonials.
Documents Required to be Submitted / Produced at the time of Walk-in-Interview:
Duly filled application form in prescribed format (available on official GMCH website)
Self-attested copies of educational qualifications (MBBS marksheets of 1st Prof, 2nd Prof, Final Prof Part-I & II; PG Degree/Certificate)
Registration Certificate with MCI/State Medical Council (attach documentary evidence)
Experience Certificate(s) after obtaining Postgraduate Qualification (attested copies in chronological order)
Valid Reservation Certificate (SC/OBC/EWS as applicable, in prescribed Government format)
No Objection Certificate (NOC) from present employer (mandatory for candidates in Government service)
Application fee: Rs. 500/- (General/OBC/EWS) or Rs. 250/- (SC) - to be deposited on the spot at GMCH
Original certificates/testimonials (must be produced at the time of interview)

No TA/DA will be paid for attending the Walk-in-Interview. The Director Principal, GMCH, Chandigarh reserves the right of any amendment, cancellation and changes to this advertisement as a whole or in part without assigning any reason or giving notice.
Submit Application at: Establishment Branch-II, Block-D, GMCH-32, Chandigarh - on 25-05-2026 before 11:00 A.M.
For queries: Visit the official website of GMCH Chandigarh - https://gmch.gov.in
important_instructions: These are tenure posts for 06 months - not permanent employment. Appointees will not be treated as regular employees of GMCH. In case of selection through walk-in-interview, candidates must apply afresh as and when regular advertisement is released. Applicants applying for multiple posts/departments are required to deposit the application fee of Rs. 500/- (Rs. 250/- for SC) only once. Applications submitted in any format other than the prescribed application form will be rejected. Incomplete applications or applications received without copies of required certificates will be rejected. Candidates already in Government service must route their applications through proper channel and attach NOC from present employer. Selected candidates must submit their NOC within 3 days from the date of interview. SC/OBC candidates applying against unreserved posts are not entitled to any relaxation in upper age limit. OBC (not BC) category claim will be considered only when accompanied by a certificate issued by the competent authority in the prescribed format, covering U.T. Chandigarh OBC list. Persons whose services were previously dispensed with by GMCH on account of misconduct or otherwise are not eligible to apply. No TA/DA will be paid for the Walk-in-Interview. The Director Principal, GMCH, Chandigarh reserves the right to amend, cancel, or change this advertisement in whole or in part without assigning any reason. Number of vacancies whether General or Reserved are tentative and can increase or decrease

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for GMCH Chandigarh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: This is a Walk-in-Interview recruitment. Applications must be submitted in person at Establishment Branch-II, Block-D, GMCH-32, Chandigarh on 25 May 2026 before 11:00 A.M. The Walk-in-Interview will be conducted on the same day (25-05-2026) at 2:00 P.M.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in GMCH Chandigarh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 77 vacancies have been announced across 35 departments for Senior Residents (across various specialties), CMO (General Medicine & General Surgery), Resident Anaesthetist, and Resident Pathologist posts. The distribution is: Gen-42, SC-03, OBC-31, EWS-01. The number of vacancies is tentative and can increase or decrease.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for GMCH Chandigarh Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The pay scale is Rs. 67,700/- (minimum pay 1st Cell of Level-11) plus Non-Practicing Allowance (NPA) @ 20% as per Central Government Services (Revised Pay) Rules 2016.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for GMCH Chandigarh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The upper age limit is 45 years as on 01-05-2026. Age relaxation is available: 3 years for OBC, 5 years for SC and Government servants (through proper channel), and 10 years for widows/deserted women/judicially separated women (not remarried).

faq.question: Q5. What educational qualification is required for Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Postgraduate Medical Degree (MD/MS/DNB/MCh/DM) or equivalent in the concerned specialty, recognized by MCI and registered either with Medical Council of India or State Medical Council. The degree must be in the relevant specialty for which the candidate is applying.

faq.question: Q6. Are these permanent posts or contract-based?
faq.answer: These are tenure posts for 06 months, which may be extendable only as per the recommendation of the Selection Committee and subject to approval of the competent authority. These are NOT permanent or regular government positions. Selected candidates must apply afresh when regular advertisement is released.

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates who have completed 3 years of Senior Residency apply?
faq.answer: No. Candidates who have completed three years tenure of Senior Residency (including experience in any Central Institution/Hospital under Central Residency Scheme) are explicitly NOT eligible for the post of Senior Resident.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application fee for GMCH Chandigarh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 500/- (non-refundable) for General/OBC/EWS candidates and Rs. 250/- (non-refundable) for SC candidates. The fee must be deposited on the spot at GMCH at the time of Walk-in-Interview. Candidates applying for multiple posts need to pay the fee only once.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for GMCH Chandigarh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: This is a Walk-in-Interview recruitment. Applications must be submitted in person at Establishment Branch-II, Block-D, GMCH-32, Chandigarh on 25 May 2026 before 11:00 A.M. The Walk-in-Interview will be conducted on the same day (25-05-2026) at 2:00 P.M.
